name: GigAid Data Model
description: Complete data model for the GigAid gig worker management application

users.description: Service provider/gig worker accounts with profile, settings, auth, billing, and onboarding data

availability.description: JSON string of weekly availability schedule

onboardingState.description: Onboarding state: not_started, in_progress, skipped_explore, completed

depositPolicySet.description: Whether user explicitly set deposit policy

aiExpectationShown.description: Whether AI onboarding expectation was shown

publicProfileEnabled.description: Whether public booking profile is enabled

stripeConnectStatus.description: Stripe Connect status: not_connected, pending, active, restricted

depositEnabled.description: Whether deposits are required for bookings

depositValue.description: Deposit value (percent 0-100 or cents if fixed)

lateRescheduleWindowHours.description: Hours before job for late reschedule penalty

lateRescheduleRetainPctFirst.description: Retain percentage for first late reschedule

lateRescheduleRetainPctSecond.description: Retain percentage for second late reschedule

publicEstimationEnabled.description: Whether public estimation tool is enabled

noShowProtectionPriceThreshold.description: Price threshold for no-show protection in cents

bookingLinkCreatedAt.description: When user first enabled public profile

bookingLinkSharedAt.description: When user first shared booking link

firstPaidBookingAt.description: When user received first paid booking

requiredSupportForPayment.description: Whether user needed help with payments

plan.description: Subscription plan: free, pro, pro_plus, business

stripeCustomerId.description: Stripe customer ID for subscription billing

subscriptionCredit.description: Credit balance in cents from referral rewards

firebaseUid.description: Firebase Auth UID for mobile authentication

isDisabled.description: Whether account is disabled by admin

accountStatus.description: Account lifecycle: active, suspended, pending_deletion, deleted

suspendedAt.description: When subscription was paused by user

scheduledDeletionAt.description: When account is scheduled for permanent deletion

inAppInboxEnabled.description: Store replies in app instead of forwarding

firstGigaidMessageSentAt.description: Timestamp of first GigAid message sent

otpCodes.description: One-time password codes for phone/email verification

status.description: Job status: scheduled, in_progress, completed, cancelled

providerLocationUpdatedAt.description: When provider location was last updated

jobResolutions.description: Revenue protection: ensures every completed job has explicit payment resolution

jobId.description: FK to jobs.id (unique - one resolution per job)

waiverReason.description: Waiver reason: warranty, redo, goodwill, internal

status.description: Lead status: new, response_sent, engaged, price_confirmed, cold, lost

source.description: Lead source: manual, booking_form, referral, social

convertedAt.description: When lead was converted to job

convertedJobId.description: ID of job created from this lead

followUpStatus.description: Follow-up status: none, pending_check, replied, waiting, no_response

sourceType.description: Platform source type: craigslist, facebook, thumbtack, etc.

respondTapCount.description: Number of times user tapped Respond

leadEmails.description: Email conversations with leads (outbound and inbound)

userPaymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted by gig workers

type.description: Payment type: stripe, zelle, venmo, cashapp, cash, check

jobPayments.description: Payment records for jobs and invoices

method.description: Payment method: stripe, zelle, venmo, etc.

status.description: Payment status: pending, processing, paid, confirmed, failed

proofUrl.description: Payment proof URL for manual payments

reminders.description: Scheduled reminders for clients about upcoming jobs

crewMembers.description: Crew members/helpers managed by a service provider

memberUserId.description: FK to users.id if registered user

role.description: Role: plumber, electrician, cleaner, helper, other

crewInvites.description: Magic link invitations for crew members to view/confirm jobs

status.description: Status: pending, viewed, confirmed, declined, expired, revoked

crewJobPhotos.description: Photos uploaded by crew members for jobs

crewMessages.description: Messages between crew members and job owner

isFromCrew.description: Whether message is from crew member

referredUserId.description: FK to users.id if signed up

bookingRequests.description: Public booking requests from clients with deposit and scheduling support

depositStatus.description: Deposit status: none, pending, held, released, refunded, partial_refunded, on_hold_dispute

completionStatus.description: Completion status: scheduled, awaiting_confirmation, completed, dispute

bookingEvents.description: Audit trail for booking lifecycle events

eventType.description: Event type: created, payment_received, rescheduled, completed, disputed, refunded, transferred

actorType.description: Actor type: customer, provider, admin, system

voiceNotes.description: Voice recordings with AI transcription and summarization

reviews.description: Client reviews and testimonials for service providers

priceConfirmations.description: Lightweight price agreements between leads and providers

status.description: Status: draft, sent, viewed, confirmed, expired

featureFlags.description: Feature flag toggles for safe rollout of new features

aiNudges.description: AI-generated nudge instances for user action prompts

nudgeType.description: Nudge type: lead_follow_up, invoice_reminder, job_stuck, etc.

status.description: Status: active, dismissed, snoozed, acted, expired

aiNudgeEvents.description: Audit trail for nudge lifecycle events

eventType.description: Event: created, shown, dismissed, snoozed, acted, expired

jobDrafts.description: QuickBook job drafts for paste-message-to-booked flow

actionQueueItems.description: Prioritized action items for Today's Money Plan

sourceType.description: Source: lead, job, invoice, nudge, system

outcomeMetricsDaily.description: Daily aggregated outcome metrics for GigAid Impact attribution

photoAssets.description: User-uploaded photos for bookings, reviews, and jobs

ownerUserId.description: FK to users.id (null for customer uploads)

estimationRequests.description: Client estimation requests requiring provider review

status.description: Status: pending, reviewed, sent, expired, cancelled

smsMessages.description: SMS message records for client communication

messageUsage.description: Monthly message usage tracking per plan limits

eventsCanonical.description: Canonical business events for analytics and co-pilot

userId.description: FK to users.id (nullable for system events)

copilotSignals.description: Co-pilot alerts and anomalies detected by the system

copilotRecommendations.description: Co-pilot focus guidance and strategic recommendations

metricsDaily.description: Aggregated daily rollup metrics for fast admin queries

attributionDaily.description: Daily channel attribution and performance tracking

admins.description: Admin users with role-based access control

adminActionAudit.description: Immutable audit log of admin actions

stallType.description: Stall type: no_response, overdue, idle, draft_aging, viewed_unpaid

nextActions.description: Next best action recommendations surfaced to users

intentSignals.description: Behavioral intent signals for ready-to-convert moments

signalType.description: Signal: time_cue, price_cue, status_engaged, job_completed, multiple_responds

readyActions.description: Pre-filled actions ready to execute with one tap

aiOverrides.description: Tracks when users modify AI-suggested values for learning

clients.description: Client tracking for risk assessment and booking protection

isFirstTime.description: Whether this is a first-time client

bookingProtections.description: Booking protection records tracking deposits and no-show prevention

aiInterventions.description: AI intervention moments when AI communicates to user or silently adjusts

providerServices.description: Services offered by providers with category classification

clientNotificationCampaigns.description: Event-driven notification campaigns sent to past clients

eventType.description: Event type: environmental, seasonal, availability, risk, relationship

eventReason.description: Why this event is relevant (max 120 chars)

userAutomationSettings.description: User automation settings for post-job follow-ups and reminders

outboundMessages.description: Scheduled outbound messages for follow-ups and reminders

status.description: Status: scheduled, queued, sent, canceled, failed

capabilityUsage.description: Capability usage tracking for plan-based limits

stripeWebhookEvents.description: Audit trail for all received Stripe webhook events

livemode.description: Whether event is from live mode

stripeIdempotencyLocks.description: Idempotency locks ensuring exactly-once webhook processing

relationships.description: Each job belongs to a service provider
Each job has at most one resolution
Resolution was created by a user
Each lead belongs to a provider
Each invoice belongs to a provider
Invoice may be linked to a job
Invoice may be linked to a lead
Invoice may originate from a ready action
Each reminder belongs to a provider
Reminder may be linked to a job
Each review is for a provider
Review may be linked to a job
Review may be linked to an invoice
Payment methods belong to a user
Payments belong to a gig worker
Payment may be linked to a job
Payment may be linked to an invoice
Crew members belong to a provider
Invite is for a crew member
Invite is for a specific job
Voice notes belong to a user
Voice notes may be linked to a job
Draft may convert to a job
Photos belong to a provider workspace
Estimation requests are for a provider
Estimation may convert to a job
SMS messages belong to a user
SMS may be related to a job
SMS may be related to a lead
Events may belong to a user
Admin may be linked to a user
Action is based on a stall detection
Log entries belong to a user
Log entries are for a next action
Ready actions belong to a user
Protection is for a specific job
Payment state may be linked to a job
Payment state may be linked to an invoice
Dispute may be linked to a job
Dispute may be linked to an invoice
Dispute may be linked to a booking
Chat messages belong to a conversation
